minecraft:lore: {"text": "📊 武器等级: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "Lv.13", "color": "#FFD700", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "⚔ 战斗等级要求: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "13", "color": "green", "bold": true}]}
{"text":"💥 伤害: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"60-80","color":"red","bold":true}]}
{"text":"☆ 暴击率: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"+2%","color":"gold","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚡ 攻击速度: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"2.0/秒","color":"aqua","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚒ 技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"星辰护盾","color":"light_purple","bold":true},{"text":" (右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}
{"text":"⚒ 特殊技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"星辰冲击","color":"#9933FF","bold":true},{"text":" (Shift+右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}
{"text": "💰 售价：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "无法出售", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔧 物品种类：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "武器 (传说)", "color": "light_purple", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔨 来自遥远星系的神秘力量。", "color": "gray", "italic": false}
{"text": "🔨 剑刃闪耀着星辰的光芒。", "color": "dark_purple", "italic": false}
{"text": "技能 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "星辰护盾", "color": "light_purple", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "召唤3个护盾球环绕", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 格挡: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "每个护盾抵挡1次攻击", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 反击伤害: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "30点固定伤害", "color": "red", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 回复: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "格挡时恢复4点生命", "color": "green", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 持续时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "5.0秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 冷却时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "8.0秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "特殊技能 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "星辰冲击", "color": "#9933FF", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "释放能量波攻击前方敌人", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 伤害: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "150%武器伤害", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 范围: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "前方直线5格", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 冷却时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "5.5秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
